payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, read-only SELECT queries are permitted, such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`. Destructive statements are not permitted, so `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes a transient permission/configuration rule for admin SQL select-only mode, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Identified `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` as allowed.

repair_options: If deletion is required, switch out of select-only mode or use an interface with write permissions.
Verify the exact allowlist for permitted SQL statements in admin mode.
